summary: Video set to music with no speech. It shows low-angle shots of the Temple of Heaven's blue and gold tiered roof against an overcast sky, a backlit shot through a dark temple doorway of Trump, Xi Jinping and Melania with aides walking toward the camera, a slow-motion close-up of the group's feet crossing a stone courtyard, an upward shot of painted and gilded ceiling beams and red columns, and a slow-motion wide shot of Trump, Melania, Xi and Eric Trump walking across the plaza flanked by security with the lower-third text 'PRESIDENT DONALD ... TRUMP.'

script.scene: Low-angle shot of the blue and gold tiered roof of the Temple of Heaven against an overcast sky, color graded cool. Music only.
Backlit shot framed through a dark temple doorway: Trump, Xi Jinping and Melania, with aides, walk toward the camera out of the bright courtyard beyond.
Slow-motion ground-level close-up of the group's feet and legs walking across the worn stone courtyard, sunlight on polished shoes.
Tilting interior shot looking up at the painted, gilded temple ceiling beams and red columns.
Slow-motion wide shot of Trump, Melania, Xi and Eric Trump walking abreast across the plaza flanked by security, with white lower-third text reading 'PRESIDENT DONALD ... TRUMP.'

notable_text: PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP (on-screen lower third); tweet: 'President Donald J. Trump Visits China's Temple of Heaven.'
